basics.name: Sotheara Chea
basics.title: Software Engineer
basics.summary: Software engineer building event-driven systems that scale. Passionate about distributed systems, cloud architecture, and solving complex problems through elegant code.

work.name: Travelers Insurance
work.summary: Building event-driven automation platforms processing 5M+ tasks/year for underwriting and support teams.
highlights: Developed Java and TypeScript/Node.js microservices for an event-driven automation platform processing 5M+ tasks/year, reducing processing times by 15% for 200+ business users
Built high-throughput Kafka pipeline on AWS EKS replicating 40,000 events/min with Confluent Replicator connectors, monitoring, and fault tolerance ensuring 99.9% reliability
Designed and shipped RESTful task creation microservice (TypeScript, Node.js, Docker, MongoDB) enabling 3 external systems to create and route tasks, processing 5K+ API requests/day
Automated task creation pipeline using Java, increasing systematic task creation from 0% to 92% and eliminating manual workload for operations teams
Architected full-stack Triage Knowledge Base using React, TypeScript, and MongoDB, enabling users to resolve issues 30% faster through intuitive search
Achieved 90%+ code coverage across 10 microservices using Jest and Mocha
Deployed Istio service mesh to 2 production EKS clusters for improved observability and zero-downtime deployments
Mentored 2 junior engineers through code reviews and pair programming

work.name: Travelers Insurance
work.summary: Built analytics dashboard and competed in coding competitions.
highlights: Built Qlik dashboard integrating ETL framework data for business leaders
Competed in Python coding competition developing game tournament algorithm
